\boxed{A}
**Clinical Reasoning:** The evidence emphasizes the centrality of functional assessments in diagnosing and managing neuromuscular disorders, noting that functional evaluations are part of integrated clinical frameworks for monitoring disease progression and guiding therapy. Specifically, functional tests are highlighted as critical components in assessing muscle performance and overall patient status in conditions involving peripheral nerves and movement disorders — core features of Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy.
